category_sources: source_facts.description says Dancer's shell, or distributed shell; official homepage describes dsh as a wrapper for executing multiple remote shell commands.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dsh; official homepage title is DSH - dancer's shell / distributed shell.
docs_sources: Official homepage contains download, compile, configuration, and usage documentation and is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage documents source tarball downloads but does not present an official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe executing commands across multiple remote hosts using rsh/remsh/ssh wrappers and host group configuration.
